verified_features: Boot screen loads with 'TOUCH TO LINK' prompt
Clicking boot screen advances to DiegeticInstall
Mode select shows SOLO, PASS & PLAY, ONLINE DUEL buttons
Clicking SOLO mode advances through rules phase to oracle selection
Selecting MENTOR oracle advances to CALIBRATION state
Calibration progresses through 3 phases (BURST, FLOW, TONE) automatically
After calibration, game transitions to BATTLE_LOOP with BattleHUD visible
BattleHUD shows player health bars, round counter (ROUND X / 10)
Battle rounds progress correctly - round counter increments
After 10 rounds, game reaches END_GAME state
LINK AGAIN (replay) button returns to boot screen
CymaticsCanvas renders particles and geometric shapes without errors
No JavaScript errors during entire Solo Mode flow (except expected mic NotFoundError)
